name: Orca Sled

pnw_species.ecological_role: Apex predator of Salish Sea; highly social, pod-based coordination; long-range migration across ocean basins

chipset_capability: Full CEDAR chipset; all 8 chips; Fleet activation; deep-water traversal
movement_pattern: Deep-water traversal; can reach any camp or open-playa location; highest mobility class. Like the transient orca pods that range across the entire Salish Sea, the Orca Sled moves freely between all camp clusters.
capacity: Full multi-agent orchestration; can host temporary camp activities in open playa. Carries complete community ecosystem wherever it travels.
home_waters: Any — the Orca Sled has no home camp, only the open sea
description: The most capable mobile platform in Virtual Black Rock City. Like the orca pods of the Salish Sea, it carries a complete community ecosystem wherever it goes — all 8 CEDAR chips active, full Fleet activation, capable of hosting temporary camp activities anywhere on the playa. The Orca Sled is the only vehicle that can operate in deep-water zones beyond the city perimeter.
